note: Canada 6-0 Qatar, World Cup 2026 group stage (18 Jun 2026, Vancouver) — Canada's first-ever men's World Cup win. All six goals count for Canada (home), including Manai's own goal. Both red cards were shown to Qatar (Al Amin, VAR-upgraded ~33'; Madibo, 53'). The two yellow cards' recipients were not reliably reported, so they are left team-only (omitted from the cards array). Names via public match reports, aligned to TxLINE's verified events by team + order.
